ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_code" TEXT /* Sector code (e.g., 'A') */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "isic_codes" (
  "isic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ISIC code */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector */,
  "isic_code" TEXT /* ISIC code (e.g., ISIC 01T03) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ISIC code */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date for the ISIC code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("isic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_isic_codes_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year (e.g., 2020, 2021) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Whether the year is a fiscal year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methodologies" (
  "methodology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each methodology */,
  "methodology_name" TEXT /* Name of the methodology */,
  "methodology_description" TEXT /* Description of the methodology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("methodology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment trend record */,
  "isic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ISIC code */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of workers in the ISIC code for the given year */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "methodology_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the methodology */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the employment trend data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date for the employment trend record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date for the employment trend record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_trends_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_trends_isic_id FOREIGN KEY ("isic_id") REFERENCES isic_codes ("isic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_trends_methodology_id FOREIGN KEY ("methodology_id") REFERENCES methodologies ("methodology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_trends_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date for the user */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date for the user record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date for the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each ISIC code
Last update date for the ISIC code
Whether the year is a fiscal year
Unique identifier for each data source
Unique identifier for each employment trend record
Percentage of workers in the ISIC code for the given year
Confidence interval for the employment trend data
